title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Pickrr - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Pickrr - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pickrr! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pickrr:
Pickrr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pickrr!
